; EDIT YOUR_MOVES: directions N/S/E/W, grid is 10x10
(define YOUR_MOVES (list "E" "E" "E" "S" "S" "S" "W" "W"))
(define SIZE 10)

(define (dir-delta d)
  (cond ((= d "N") (list -1 0)) ((= d "S") (list 1 0))
        ((= d "E") (list 0 1))  ((= d "W") (list 0 -1))
        (else (list 0 0))))

(define (simulate moves)
  (define snake (list (list 5 5)))
  (define alive #t)
  (define die-reason "")
  (for-each (lambda (d)
    (if alive
      (let ((head (car snake)) (delta (dir-delta d)))
        (let ((new-r (+ (nth head 0) (nth delta 0)))
              (new-c (+ (nth head 1) (nth delta 1))))
          (cond ((or (< new-r 0) (< new-c 0) (>= new-r SIZE) (>= new-c SIZE))
                 (set! alive #f) (set! die-reason (string-append "hit wall on " d)))
                ((member? (list new-r new-c) snake)
                 (set! alive #f) (set! die-reason (string-append "self-collision on " d)))
                (else (set! snake (append (list (list new-r new-c)) snake))))))))
    moves)
  (list snake alive die-reason))

(define result (simulate YOUR_MOVES))
(define snake (nth result 0))
(define alive (nth result 1))

(define (render-cell r c)
  (cond ((= (list r c) (car snake)) "◉")
        ((member? (list r c) snake) "●")
        (else "·")))
(println (string-append "Length: " (number->string (length snake))
                        "  Alive: " (if alive "yes" (string-append "NO (" (nth result 2) ")"))))
(for-each (lambda (r)
  (println (string-join (map (lambda (c) (render-cell r c)) (range 0 SIZE)) " ")))
  (range 0 SIZE))
